name: Gulfresh
desc: Premium cleaning services brand for GCC markets. Trademark filing active with a clear market window. Built for rapid entry across Qatar and UAE.

name: Idlyo
desc: South Indian F&B chain rooted in a multi-generational family catering legacy from Theni, Tamil Nadu. Authentic heritage in a modern format.

name: Flagpur
desc: Flag marketplace connected to Tirupur's textile legacy and freedom fighter Kodi Kumaran's heritage. Three.js 3D city game prototype already built.

name: Equbri
desc: Algorithmic trading platform built on Angular, Ionic, Spring Boot, and Kite Connect. Three viable business model paths identified under SEBI framework.

name: Probfit
desc: Probability-based trading discipline marketplace with a proprietary ProbFit Score system. Co-founder vision document complete.

name: Yeluck
desc: Marketplace, delivery, and gamified rewards for Bodinayakkanur. Yeluck Points and Lucky Draws. Break-even projected Month 8–10. Co-founder on the ground.

name: Parkji
desc: Smart parking and PropTech platform for high-density urban Indian markets.

name: Medippo
desc: Mobile medical care for senior citizens. Gulf NRI subscription model. Phased van → bus → drone → air ambulance infrastructure. 10-year financial model produced.

name: Missilent
desc: Anti-stealth defence tech using multi-spectral passive detection fusion. iDEX ADITI grant pathway identified.

name: Ammnee
desc: E-commerce and aggregator platform for the Kongu region. Name derived from the Tamil term for respectful woman. Focused on Coimbatore, Pollachi, Avinashi.

name: Castoven
desc: Parent manufacturer brand for rocket stove hardware. Hero product line: LSTOVE. Wood fuel supply identified as a natural business complement.

name: Yfreshy
desc: Vertical farming startup and product brand selling fresh produce globally. Domain secured at yfreshy.com.

name: Aramsey
desc: Humanitarian non-profit brand whose name is rooted in Arabic and Persian words for peace. Purpose-driven and globally facing.

name: Smarex Academy
desc: Knowledge and community engine running industry research events, bug bounty services, and hackathons — grooming the next generation of builders across GCC and Tamil Nadu.
